stamp_rationale: Outcome is the ship state: three lens scripts live in main (commit 10bd394), hardened with repo-root containment (same commit), portfolio-validated on 5 projects. No post-ship regressions reported. No deliverables missing.

verdicts.reason: All three lens scripts shipped cleanly. No post-ship bug reports. Both prior BUGS objections (false-positive + goalpost) resolved or overridden with evidence.
verdicts.evidence: git log --follow ux_completeness.py mobile_usability.py cult_status.py shows stable state since 10bd394

verdicts.reason: Path-containment check is live in all three scripts. Pattern codified in learnings.md as a standing rule for future verifier ticks. No remaining SECURITY concerns.
CLI output format shipped matches plan: advisory [WARN] lines + WARNINGS/PASS summary. --help documented. Exit codes explicit.
README.md + changes.md fully document what shipped, how to run, what each check looks for.

Tick delivered on its stated goal: three advisory lens scripts that catch UX completeness, mobile usability, and cult-status issues in YOLO single-file HTML projects. Portfolio evidence confirms real-world signal. Advisory mode ensures no build disruption.
Internal infrastructure exempt from signature-move bar per standing override (feedback_utility_focus).

Every documented pattern was followed: path-containment rule codified BEFORE shipping (learnings.md:30), advisory-mode output per zero-dep YOLO pattern, regex-based heuristics constrained to plan scope (100-200 LOC). No lessons violated.
verdicts.evidence: learnings.md:30; plan.md 'Advisory mode' clause; script line counts (128, 124, 146)
